projects.description: S AND COMPETITION SAdvanced Machine Learning – VAE based CT to MRI Medical Image Translation Aug 202 5 – De c 202 5 Built a 3 - module generative pipeline (TLM + FLM + VAE) for CT - to - MRI medical image translation under strict VRAM constraints . Applied Real NVP normalizing flow as alearned latent prior to mitigate VAE over - smoothing artifacts . Achieved PSNR 25.52 / SSIM 0.825, surpassing Pix2Pix baseline with only 4.7M parameters (12× more efficient) . Deep Learning – CBAM Attention - based Cr owd Detection Mar 202 5 – Jun 202 5 Proposed aglobal Gaussian kernel for more uniform ground - truth supervision and integrated CBAM attention between VGG - 16 front - end and dilated convolution back - end of CSRNet . De signed astable training pipeline with optimized hyperparameters to ensure effective model convergence. Evaluated on the Shanghai Tech Part Adataset, showing improved density map quality and robustness to scale variation. Introduced ahybrid loss (MSE + SSIM + Count Loss), reducing MAE from 434 to 103 and boosting validation accuracy from 15.8% to 79.7% . Introduction to Computer Visio n – Tr OCR Receipt Scanner Mar 202 5 – Jun 202 5 Integrated Tr OCR (Vision Transformer + autoregressive decoder) for robust text extraction from handwritten and complex real - world receipts . Applied CLAHE contrast enhancement and Hough Transform - based affine deskewing to handle faded and warped receipt inputs . Arranged preprocessed images into Layout LMv3 for structured information extraction, targeting automated expense tracking and claims processing . RE:ALThon GDG on Campus – AI Fishing Compliance App (Excellence Award) Dec 202 4 Contributed to sourcing and integrating public datasets, preprocessing data to ensure compatibility and enable system functionality. Built a Flutter mobile app integrating Google Gemini API to identify fish species from camera images and determine protected/catchable status in real time . Implemented GPS - based fishing restriction zone alerts using Naver Maps API, promoting awareness of marine protected areas .
